results.name: Гость не может открыть портал
results.evidence: Guest /portal returned opaqueredirect/0 without showing the dashboard.

results.name: Владелец создает сайт и видит инструкции верификации
results.evidence: Created site_01kqkgas6p9jpkbkw0dx3g0wqs and saw DNS/file instructions.

results.name: Неверифицированный сайт не получает production modes
results.evidence: Both mode enable attempts left the pending site without production modes.

results.name: Верифицированный владелец включает оба режима сайта
results.evidence: Both api_resource and web_client modes appear on dashboard.

results.name: Владелец выпускает API token и видит raw token один раз
results.evidence: Raw token appeared once for token id 1 and disappeared after reload.

results.name: Выпуск API token отклоняется для неeligible site
results.evidence: Pending and web-only sites did not receive raw API tokens.

results.name: Владелец создает OIDC web client и видит secret один раз
results.evidence: Client client_01kqkgawehs03xwhkr8h20qx3x secret appeared once and disappeared after reload.

results.name: Создание OIDC client отклоняется для неeligible site
results.evidence: Pending and api-only sites did not receive client secrets.

results.name: Redirect URI принимает exact HTTPS и отклоняет unsafe values
results.evidence: Valid HTTPS redirect accepted; http, wildcard and malformed values rejected.

results.name: Duplicate redirect URI не создает duplicate visible entries
results.evidence: Duplicate redirect did not add a row or audit event.

results.name: Existing OIDC web login работает с portal-created client
results.evidence: Authorize, token exchange and userinfo succeeded for portal-created client.

results.name: Revoke API token требует явного подтверждения
results.evidence: Empty/yes confirmations did not mutate state; exact revoke revoked the token.

results.name: Revoke OIDC client требует явного подтверждения
results.evidence: Empty/delete confirmations did not mutate state; exact revoke revoked the client.

results.name: Revoked OIDC client не принимает новый redirect URI
results.evidence: Revoked client rejected a new redirect URI.

results.name: Audit table записывает lifecycle events без secrets
results.evidence: Portal showed lifecycle audit events and audit metadata did not contain raw token/client secret.

results.name: Чужой владелец не может управлять ресурсами другого владельца
results.evidence: Owner B dashboard hid Owner A data and direct mutation attempts returned 404.

results.name: Dashboard остается usable с длинными значениями
results.evidence: Desktop/mobile screenshots captured; page has no body horizontal overflow, controls stay inside viewport, and Audit is horizontally scrollable.
